transcript_spans.text: Thick shot, dude. You actually get more points when it hits the board. Thanks, guys. You guys think you got something? Let me see you do it. It's all about confidence, Taylor. That just happened. No way. Who does that? I do that.

What's up, brother? I ended up staying at Dave's last night. I just woke up. Now he's missing. Last night was obviously pretty weird. Alex is acting like super, super strange. Yeah, I can't find him. Holy shit. I just seen Dave walking into the woods.

You saw him in the woods? I'm coming to get you. Be ready. Okay, yeah, just come to Dustin's. Did you change your pants? I don't want that smell on my truck, man. Yeah, I took a shower and changed my pants. Just saying. Well, I'm almost there. Be ready. Yeah, I'll see you soon. Grab lights. Make sure you got lights. Okay, bye.

segments.text: Thick shot, dude. You actually get more points when it hits the board. Thanks, guys. You guys think you got something? Let me see you do it. It's all about confidence, Taylor. That just happened. No way. Who does that? I do that.

What's up, brother? I ended up staying at Dave's last night. I just woke up. Now he's missing. Last night was obviously pretty weird. Alex is acting like super, super strange. Yeah, I can't find him. Holy shit. I just seen Dave walking into the woods.

You saw him in the woods? I'm coming to get you. Be ready. Okay, yeah, just come to Dustin's. Did you change your pants? I don't want that smell on my truck, man. Yeah, I took a shower and changed my pants. Just saying. Well, I'm almost there. Be ready. Yeah, I'll see you soon. Grab lights. Make sure you got lights. Okay, bye.

What's up? What's going on guys? We gotta go. Dude, I'm actually starting to believe Dave is 11. Honestly dude, me too. Last night when I got home, Alex kept saying he was Will. Kept talking about the upside down, Demogorgons. Dude, he puked up a leech. Puked up a leech?
Yeah, dude. It's gotta be real. How else could he have made me piss myself? And he made you shit your pants, dude. It's not funny, guys. Dave has powers. Made you shit your pants? Oh, Mr. Poop Pants.
Mike! Dustin! Mike! Mike! Mike! Dustin! Lucas! Mike! Mike! Eleven? It's me!

Will! Will? Will! Eleven. What are you doing here? How'd you get out of the Upside Down? Pop saved me. I'm just glad you're here, Will. What the hell are you guys doing? That's the guy that kidnapped me. I... I did not. I didn't.

Let's not do that. Dave. Eleven. We're your friends. Friend? Yes, friends. Will. Friend. What is going on right now? Alright, here's my stop. Alright man, I gotta drop these guys off and I'm coming back. Do not watch Stranger Things.
Why? Just promise me, dude. I'll be right back. I'm gonna drop these guys off. Okay. Taylor! Mike, come in. It's Lucas. Over. Taylor? Mike! Taylor! Mike! Dude! You watched it, didn't you?
God damn it. God damn it.
